ValidationRule.description: Limit the action on checkbox "Current HOC validation" to User with position HOC
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ischanged(Current_HOC_approval__c) , OR( NOT(ispickval($User.Position__c, 'Head of Country')), NOT(CONTAINS( $User.TECH_TextBusinessDevelopmentRegions__c ,Contact_Owner_Business_Region__c)) ), !$User.BypassValidationRules__c)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This box is intended for approval tracking of Head of Country from the current business region
